name: The Design Philosophers and the Builder
description: Routes software design work through a bounded Mealy-style workflow using Socrates, Plato, Aristotle, Bacon, Hoare, Epictetus, Diogenes, and Builder 1986. Use for software designed from scratch, scope-drift control, TOML handoffs, collision-free Feature Branch Workflow, flat Git worktrees, one-task-at-a-time worktree slicing, proof-carrying handoff validation, fixed action-to-agent dispatch/loading, and one-patch-at-a-time patch discipline.
author: @drhunn

operation.description: Operation to run: describe, available_events, dispatch, dispatch_and_load, resolve_actions, load_actions, happy_path, handoff_template, validate_handoff, routing_guidance, or builder_constraint.

state.description: Current state, for example S6C_BUILDER_TASK_SLICE_PLANNING. Required for available_events, dispatch, and dispatch_and_load.

event.description: Event to dispatch, for example task_slice_complete or patch_task_complete. Required for dispatch and dispatch_and_load.

action.description: Optional single action name for resolve_actions or load_actions, for example run_socrates.

actions_json.description: Optional JSON array of action names for resolve_actions or load_actions, for example ["run_socrates","check_build_package"].

context_json.description: Optional JSON object. For guarded Builder transitions, include artifact_toml or handoff proof data rather than bare booleans.

user_input.description: Optional user request to classify against the current bounded artifact. The handler returns routing guidance, not final judgment.

artifact_toml.description: Optional current TOML handoff artifact containing git, task, patch, validation, documentation, and remaining_work sections. Used by validate_handoff and guarded dispatch.

guard.description: Optional guard name for validate_handoff, for example task_documentation_updated or patch_task_documentation_updated.

examples.prompt: Start the design philosophers workflow for a new software idea and load the next agent prompt.
Resolve the Socrates action to its bundled agent file.
Load the Builder agent prompt for task-slice planning.
Validate this TOML handoff before completing a task slice.
Give me the formal handoff template.
